name: rAthena Board Metadata Library
description: Community reference library for rAthena Board metadata-only review, routing hints, and curated learning candidates.
license: Forum terms apply; metadata-only summaries are curated locally.
permissionNote: Metadata-only use. No crawler, no pagination, no raw HTML, no post copying, no login, no attachments.
allowedUse: metadata of categories, sections, topic titles exposed on the homepage, dates, and routing hints for support/database/source/client-side topics.
trustPolicy: Community forum context is informative only. Local project data, rAthena, and curated internal packs have priority.
conflictPolicy: Forum metadata never blocks alone and never overrides local data. Use only as hint/context for human review.
updatePolicy: Manual, metadata-only refresh planning. If robots/terms or page behavior are unclear, refresh is skipped_by_policy.
refreshPolicy: Metadata-only. No crawler, no follow links, no pagination, no bulk, no raw HTML, no dump.
learningPolicy: Observation may create review-first learning candidates with sanitized summaries only.
licensePolicy: Preserve forum URL, section provenance, and authorship metadata when it is already public and strictly necessary.
authorizedUsePolicy: Allowed for metadata summaries, topic routing hints, and human-review context. Not allowed for raw post copying or mass collection.
changelog: 2026-05-23: Added metadata-only community source policy for controlled refresh and learning.
notes: Registered as an internal library first. Live forum refresh remains policy-constrained.
